name: Azealia Banks

acts.description: Repeated use of homophobic slurs, antisemitic statements, and targeted harassment campaigns on social media
Attacked flight attendant in 2015; bit Russell Crowe

behavior_summary: Years of documented hate speech against gay men, Jewish people, and various ethnic groups via social media. Physical altercation with Russell Crowe in 2016. Erratic and often incoherent public behavior.

art.summary: Genuinely gifted rapper who announced herself as a major talent and then spent the next decade torching her own career.

verdict.blurb: 212 is a bona fide rap classic and she has spent the decade since proving that talent and decency are completely unrelated qualities. The slurs are the brand at this point.
